HKJK Coordination

HKJK & HKNW

  • HKJK Controllers, particularly Tower and Approach, should be mindful of simultaneous operations at HKJK and HKNW. In most circumstances, most aircraft taking off from HKNW will be taking off to the south, which can cause a conflict for inbound traffic landing on 06. In the event of HKNW traffic, releases from HKJK should be coordinated with Approach, if online, however in most circumstances, HKJK traffic will be given priority.

HKJK Jomo Kenyatta Intl | v0.1
